title: Gadarmal Devi temple
tagline: Gadarmal Devi temple — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Gadarmal Devi temple is a Hindu and Jain temple at Badoh village of Vidisha, Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Gadarmal Devi temple is a Hindu and Jain temple at Badoh village of Vidisha, Madhya Pradesh. Also called Gadarmal Temple of the Mothers, it is one of India's yogini temples. It has 42 niches for yogini statues, unusually arranged in a rectangle; it must originally have been hypaethral.

topPlaces.name: Pathari
topPlaces.description: Pathari is a town in Vidisha district, it's also a tehsil headquarter. Many tourist attractions in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh located here.

topPlaces.name: Pathari State
topPlaces.description: Pathari State is a princely state established by Nawab Hayder Mohammad Khan of the Orakzai clan of Mirazikhel Pashtuns. The State of Bhopal and Rahatgarh (later Rahatgarh State) became Pathari after the East India Company took control of Rahatgarh.

items.note: Pathari is a town in Vidisha district, it's also a tehsil headquarter. Many tourist attractions in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh located here.

Pathari State is a princely state established by Nawab Hayder Mohammad Khan of the Orakzai clan of Mirazikhel Pashtuns. The State of Bhopal and Rahatgarh (later Rahatgarh State) became Pathari after the East India Company took control of Rahatgarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gadarmal Devi temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gadarmal Devi temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gadarmal Devi temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gadarmal Devi temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gadarmal Devi temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gadarmal Devi temple?
faq.a: Stays in Gadarmal Devi temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gadarmal Devi temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pathari, Pathari State.
